sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) confidence, and adv. confidently, with confident mind, Gen 34:25.

(2) security, Isa 32:17. In other places always לָבֶטַח and בֶּטַח adv.-(a) without danger and fear, safely. יָשַׁב לָבֶטַח, יָשַׁב בֶּטַח, שָׁכַן to dwell safely, 1Sa 12:11 Lev 25:18, 19 Lev 25:19 26:5 Deu 33:12.-(b) without fear, securely, Mic 2:8. Sometimes used of one who is in too great security and without caution, Jud. 8:11 .

(3) [Betah], pr.n. of a town of Syria abounding in brass, situated on the borders of Hadadezer, 2Sa 8:8, called in the parallel place, 1Ch 18:8, טִבְחַת.
